summary: First backend testing pass for GoldSmith Pro ERP against public URL https://goldsmith-pro-erp.preview.emergentagent.com. 18/18 pytest cases passed across Auth, Dashboard, Clients (list+filter+create+get), Orders (list, create with custom_purity + base64 design_image, get with client/karigar embedded, advance-stage twice including Delivered transition), Ledgers (gold auto & custom purity, silver, diamond, gemstone, cash), Invoices (subtotal/GST/total math), Inventory (low_stock flag), Notifications, Global Search, and Karigars (enriched work_assigned/work_completed/material_balance). No ObjectId leakage detected; all IDs are string UUIDs.

minor.issue: Uses ISO parse on expected_delivery inside a broad try/except - malformed dates are silently swallowed. Not blocking.
Revenue chart uses month-only match against last 6 months (30-day step) which can double-count if months repeat and ignores year-only cases. Cosmetic.
OAuth2 form login not directly exercised in this suite (login-json covered). Recommend adding a form-login test in future iteration.

action_items: Populate /app/memory/test_credentials.md with the seeded Owner credentials so future testing agents don't rely on hardcoded values.
Consider adding an OAuth2 form-login regression test in later iterations.
Optional: harden /api/dashboard revenue_chart month bucketing to use (year,month) tuples instead of 30-day steps to avoid month collisions across years.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1010 lines - approaching the 700-line soft limit; consider splitting into routers (auth, clients, orders, ledger, invoices, dashboard) for maintainability.
Client-name enrichment inside /api/orders and /api/invoices does an N+1 query per row; fine for demo scale but should be replaced with a $lookup aggregation for production.
advance-stage endpoint does not validate stage order (can jump backwards); acceptable if intentional, otherwise add ordinal check.
@app.on_event('startup') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handlers.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Tests created a TEST_ClientCo client (cleaned up) and TEST orders/ledger entries against the first seeded client; these persist but are prefixed TEST_ / marked TEST in remarks for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://goldsmith-pro-erp.preview.emergentagent.com. Owner login: owner@goldsmith.pro / Owner@12345 (auto-seeded). Frontend env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Use /api/auth/login-json for JSON login. All models use string UUIDs; MongoDB _id is stripped. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_goldsmith_erp.py can be reused as regression.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this pass.
